title: Pathology Laboratory Techniques Mission and Vision
content:
Pathology Laboratory Techniques Mission and Vision

MISSION

To educate students with ethical and moral values that will meet the needs of our country's pathology technician, by adhering to the rules required by his professional knowledge, qualified, contemporary, open to innovations, with empathy skills, considering global and social changes.

VISION

To train highly respected staff who have a high level of knowledge in the field of Pathology Laboratory Techniques and are preferred in private and public hospitals.
